name: audio-hooks
description: Audio notifications + AI-controlled config for every Claude Code event. 26 hooks, native matcher routing, TTS, webhooks, status line, focus flow, rate-limit alerts.

webhook_url.description: Optional webhook URL (Slack/Discord/Teams/ntfy/raw). Leave blank to skip.

webhook_format.description: Optional webhook format: slack | discord | teams | ntfy | raw.

tts_enabled.description: Enable TTS announcements. true | false. Default: false.
